name: Darshan Maniar
tagline: I take legacy systems everyone's afraid to touch — and make them fast, stable, and modern.
summary: Full Stack Engineer with 7+ years in enterprise application development, now in Germany pursuing a Master's in Software Engineering at Hochschule Heilbronn. I specialize in legacy system modernization, performance optimization, and team leadership — with a soft spot for the creative side of building software.

journey.title: B.E. Computer Science
journey.detail: Where it all started. Graduated 2017 with a CGPA of 8.24 and an itch to build real things.

journey.title: Senior Software Engineer
journey.detail: Five years of shipping maintainable software, code reviews, pair programming, and mentoring juniors.

journey.title: Software Engineer III
journey.detail: Led legacy modernization for systems serving 1M+ members. Built monitoring that cut failure detection from hours to minutes.

journey.title: M.Sc. Software Engineering & Management
journey.detail: New country, new language, new chapter. Building toward a long-term career in Germany's tech sector.

german.note: Deutsch lernen: in progress. Ich gebe nicht auf.

highlights: Architected a real-time health monitoring system (React, microservices, Azure Workbooks) cutting failure detection from 8–10 hours to 10–15 minutes across 50+ global applications.
Stabilized a legacy subscription system serving 50K vendors and 1M international members — support tickets down 30%.
Modernized legacy apps: TFS → Git migration, framework upgrades, automated CI/CD — 20% performance gain.
Built microservices with .NET 8, RabbitMQ, and Web API to restructure member subscription processing.
Led PI planning and mentored a team of junior developers — 10% faster project delivery.
Delivered high-quality, maintainable software across demanding enterprise projects for five years.
Collaborated closely with QA and stakeholders to gather requirements and ship time-sensitive updates.
Ran regular code reviews and pair-programming sessions, coaching junior developers.

projects.title: System Health Monitoring Dashboard
projects.role: Senior Full Stack Developer · Reveation Labs
projects.pitch: From "the client called, something's down" to "we fixed it before anyone noticed."
points: Real-time dashboard + intelligent alerting for 200+ mission-critical production systems.
Mean Time to Detection: hours → minutes.
Automated notifications with contextual error analysis for faster root-cause hunting.

projects.title: Legacy Modernization & DevOps Transformation
projects.pitch: Turning a VB-era monolith into modular, CI/CD-powered components — without breaking production.
points: Migrated legacy VB applications from TFS to Git and upgraded .NET framework versions.
Modular NuGet package strategy eliminated version chaos across 200+ applications.
CI/CD with automated code review: deployments went from hours to minutes.

projects.title: AI Tool Adoption in Academic Research
projects.pitch: What actually happens when researchers adopt AI tools? I surveyed, measured, and found out.
points: Designed a structured survey methodology — 36 responses over 29 days.
Statistical analysis + thematic coding across 5 research phases.
Found 78% productivity gains, but reliability gaps eroding user trust.
